zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Montfichet於大約1178年出生時，她的父親Richard De Montfichet29歲，母親Millicent de Montfichet23歲。她於大約1190年與Hugh de Bolebec III在英國諾圖波藍德結婚。她去世於1230年之後在英國。

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Montfichet was born about 1178, her father, Richard De Montfichet, was 29 and her mother, Millicent de Montfichet, was 23. She married Hugh de Bolebec III about 1190, in Northumberland, England. She died after 1230, in England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Montfichetが約1178年に生まれた時，父Richard De Montfichetは29歳，母Millicent de Montfichetは23歳であった。約1190年にイギリスノースウンバーランドでHugh de Bolebec IIIと結婚した。彼女は1230年以後にイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Montfichet(이)가 대략 1178년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard De Montfichet(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Millicent de Montfichet(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1190년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 Hugh de Bolebec III(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1230년 이후 영국에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Montfichet nasceu aproximadamente 1178, seu pai, Richard De Montfichet, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Millicent de Montfichet, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh de Bolebec III aproximadamente 1190, em Northumberland, Inglaterra. Ela faleceu após 1230, em Inglaterra.

ru.Skelton-in-Cleveland, Rise & Withernwick: скелтон ин кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Montfichet родилась около 1178 г., её отцу по имени Richard De Montfichet было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Millicent de Montfichet, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh de Bolebec III около 1190 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия. Она умерла после 1230 г. в местности Англия.
